# Ejemplo de JSON de una sala

```json
{
  "rooms": {
    "afefotz-8f4g": {
      "p1": {
        "name": "Afefotz",
        "photo": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
        "score": 12
      },
      "p2": {
        "name": "Sabrina",
        "photo": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
        "score": 4
      },
      "settings": {
        "accentColor": "#c0c0c0",
        "colors": {
          "bg": "#3a3a3a",
          "primary": "#2b2b2b",
          "score": "#ffffff",
          "secondary": "#8c8c8c",
          "text": "#000000",
          "window": "#6b6b6b"
        },
        "customTitle": "Liga S Potosina - Semana 9",
        "opacity": 96,
        "showPhotos": true,
        "swapPlayers": true,
        "theme": "theme-win95",
        "verticalMode": false
      }
    },
  }
}
```
